nodes.name: Black-chinned mountain tanager
nodes.summary: Black-chinned mountain tanager（Anisognathus notabilis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Black-chinned mountain tanager。

nodes.name: Anisognathus
nodes.summary: Anisognathus（Anisognathus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Santa Marta mountain tanager、Lacrimose mountain tanager、Scarlet-bellied mountain tanager等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black-chinned mountain tanager
nodes.summary: The black-chinned mountain tanager (Anisognathus notabilis) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia and Ecuador. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
